_note: Console<->oc parity tour. Deploys hello-dcs so Workloads has content; the Networking/Storage/Config parity checks only assert the oc view runs (objects may be empty). imagePullPolicy=Always re-pulls the mutable tag.

steps.run: oc create deployment hello-dcs --image=${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:1.0 && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
